red-on-light.$description: System red — error states on light background (AAA on white)

red-on-dark.$description: System red — error states on dark background

green-on-light.$description: System green — success states on light background (AAA on white)

green-on-dark.$description: System green — success states on dark background

blue.$description: System blue — info states on light background (AAA on white and tinted bg)

blue-on-dark.$description: System blue — info states on dark background

amber.$description: System amber — warning states on light background (AAA on tinted bg)

amber-on-dark.$description: System amber — warning states on dark background

green-dark.$description: System green dark — success text on tinted backgrounds (AAA on green-bg)

blue-bg.$description: Info state background tint — light surface

amber-bg.$description: Warning state background tint — light surface

green-bg.$description: Success state background tint — light surface

red-bg.$description: Danger state background — white so destructive-on-light achieves AAA (7.10:1)

blue-bg-dark.$description: Info state background tint — dark surface (AAA 7.18:1 with blue-on-dark)

amber-bg-dark.$description: Warning state background tint — dark surface (AAA ~12:1 with amber-on-dark)

green-bg-dark.$description: Success state background tint — dark surface (AAA 8.28:1 with green-on-dark)

red-bg-dark.$description: Danger state background tint — dark surface (AAA 8.05:1 with red-on-dark)

neutral-bg-dark.$description: Neutral state background tint — dark surface (AAA ~12:1 with grey-lightest)
